device_name: CELLAVISION DM1200 WITH THE BODY FLUID APPLICTION
intended_use: DM 1200 is an automated system intended for in vitro diagnostic use. The body fluid application is intended for differential count of white blood cells. The system automatically locates and presents i
intended_use_full: DM 1200 is an automated system intended for in vitro diagnostic use. The body fluid application is intended for differential count of white blood cells. The system automatically locates and presents images of cells on cytocentrifuged body fluid preparations. The operator identifies and verifies the suggested classification of each cell according to type. DM1200 is intended to be used by skilled operators, trained in the use of the device and in recognition of blood cells.
target_condition: White blood cell differential counting in body fluids (cerebrospinal fluid, serous fluid, synovial fluid)
ground_truth: CeliaVision DM96 with body fluid application (predicate device); reference method based on approved guideline CLSI document EP9-A2 with 200-cell differential count performed on each slide
other_metrics: Slope and 95% confidence intervals reported for each cell class (Neutrophils: 0.9969 [0.9868-1.0070], Lymphocytes: 0.9815 [0.9656-0.9973], Eosinophils: 1.1048 [1.0782-1.1314], Macrophages: 1.0067 [0.9901-1.0232], Other cells: 0.9534 [0.9207-0.9861]). Short-term imprecision (SD%) reported for test and reference methods across all cell classes.
